dependsOn.guidance: Briefs that must be built before this one — usually the tables this model's relationships point at.

instructions.whoFillsThisIn: Developers (Product can sanity-check the information being stored).
instructions.when: Whenever a page needs to store data. One of these per model/table.
instructions.how: Answer in plain English where you can.
instructions.note: Solution = the folder this file sits in. Table / object name = this file's name.

whatThisModelIs.question: What does this model represent, in one line?
whatThisModelIs.answer: A configured AI provider (Claude first, others pluggable): its endpoint, its models, and the alias of its key in the OS credential store — never the key itself.

fields.guidance: One entry per piece of data.

entries.description: The model names this provider offers to the app

entries.rules: unique; an alias only — the key value lives in the OS credential store under this alias
entries.description: The name under which the API key is stored in the OS credential store

relationships.guidance: How this model connects to others. Leave entries empty if it stands alone.

lookupsAndPerformance.question: Which fields do we search or filter on a lot?

retention.question: How long do we keep this data / when is it deleted?
retention.answer: Until the user removes the provider. Removing the row must also remove the key from the OS credential store.

sensitiveFields.question: Any sensitive fields that need extra protection?
sensitiveFields.answer: The API key itself never enters this table, the database file, config, code, or logs — only its keyAlias is stored here; the value lives in the OS credential store (per the solution's security rules).

invariants.question: Anything that must always be true?
invariants.answer: Every row's keyAlias is unique and refers to an entry in the OS credential store (or the documented encrypted-file fallback on Linux without Secret Service).

changesOverTime.guidance: Each time you come back to change this model, add an entry describing what should change.
